publishedAbstract: - Snapshot of volume `volume 0001-0011-openshift-storage-0000000000000001-aaaaaaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaaaaaaaaaa` created by a custom `volumeSnapshotClass` is failing with "No snapshot secret/namespace provided" error.- Unable to take `volumeSnapShot` of a `PersistentVolumeClaim`.- Dell PPDM / The OADP operator isn't able to take `volumeSnapShot`of a `persistentVolumeClaim` while creating a `Backup`.
publishedTitle: Failed to take snapshot of a volume: "rpc error: code = Unknown desc = provided secret is empty" in RHOCP 4
